basic_details.job_title: Prasar Bharati Anchors Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Prasar Bharati Anchors Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website prasarbharati.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Prasar Bharati Anchors Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/ Mass Communication/ relevant field from any university / institute, Camera friendly face with a voice of a very good quality suited for telecast, Correct pronunciation accent and modulation, Proficiency in English Language
qualification.details: Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/ Mass Communication/ relevant field from any university / institute. Camera friendly face with a voice of a very good quality suited for telecast. Correct pronunciation accent and modulation. Proficiency in English Language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Prasar Bharati Anchors Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Prasar Bharati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Anchors Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Prasar Bharati Anchors Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Anchors Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/ Mass Communication/ relevant field from any university / institute. Camera friendly face with a voice of a very good quality suited for telecast. Correct pronunciation accent and modulation. Proficiency in English Language.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Anchors Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Prasar Bharati Anchors Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Prasar Bharati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Anchors Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Prasar Bharati Anchors recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Prasar Bharati Anchors recruitment is 23rd July 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Anchors post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Anchors post in the Prasar Bharati recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Anchors post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism/Mass Communication or a relevant field. Additionally, a camera-friendly appearance, good voice quality, correct pronunciation, and proficiency in English are essential.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Anchors position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Anchors post is 45 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Anchors role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Anchors post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 1,00,000 to Rs. 1,50,000, which is negotiable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Anchors recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Anchors post will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by a test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity with Prasar Bharati.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the Prasar Bharati Anchors recruitment must be submitted online only through the official website or the provided application link.
